posts.title: Getting Started with React Router
posts.content: React Router enables client side routing. In V6, loader and action functions replace useEffect for data management, giving us a more robust router-first architecture.
posts.author: Ahmed

posts.title: Why Tailwind CSS V4 is a Game Changer
posts.content: Tailwind V4 brings CSS native variables directly into the compiler, dropping the need for tailwind.config.js and making modern styling faster and easier.
